changelog:
Major UI overhaul with modern design
- New modern color palette and professional styling
- Redesigned sidebar with active navigation indicators
- Status bar showing app version and status
- Enhanced dashboard with improved cards
- Better table styling with alternating rows
- In-app update download with progress bar
- Skip version feature for updates
- Automatic periodic update checks (every 24h)
- Offline detection with retry
- Improved database creation with validation
- Better error handling throughout
